content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至15题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 再次欢迎收听本节目，我们会为大家提供热门旅游目的地的旅行建议，
content.en_text: Welcome once again to the show where we give you travel tips on popular tourist destinations

content.cn_text: 这些目的地位于太平洋地区。
content.en_text: in the Pacific region.

content.cn_text: 今天我们的重点是美丽的 Stanley Island。
content.en_text: And today our focus is on beautiful Stanley Island.

content.cn_text: 在开始之前，先提醒一下，前往该岛的水上飞机服务已经停止，
content.en_text: Now before we get started, a word of warning, the sea plane service to the island was discontinued

content.cn_text: 上周就停运了，所以至少在接下来的一个月里，前往该岛的唯一交通方式是
content.en_text: last week, so for the next month at least the sole link to the island is provided by

content.cn_text: 旧的渡轮服务，因为开通前往该岛的气垫船服务计划已经推迟。
content.en_text: the old ferry service since plans to run a hovercraft service to the island have been delayed.

content.cn_text: 那么在 Stanley Island 有什么可看、可做的呢？
content.en_text: So what is there to see and do on Stanley Island?

content.cn_text: 主要旅游区位于该岛的北海岸、南海岸和东海岸。
content.en_text: Well the main tourist areas are on the north, south and east coasts of the island.

content.cn_text: 就娱乐活动而言，在南部你会发现几个休闲公园区，比如 Water
content.en_text: As far as recreation goes, in the south you'll find several leisure park lands such as Water

content.cn_text: World 和 Fantasy Island，它们设施完善，价格也合理。
content.en_text: World and Fantasy Island, which seem well equipped and reasonably priced.

content.cn_text: 如果你想打高尔夫，岛南部的18洞球场目前
content.en_text: If it's golf you're after, the 18-hole course in the south of the island is currently

content.cn_text: 正在被改造成会议中心，不过别失望，还有两个很棒的球场，
content.en_text: being turned into a conference centre, but don't despair, there are two excellent courses

content.cn_text: 就在30分钟路程外的东海岸。
content.en_text: just 30 minutes away on the east coast.

content.cn_text: 岛的南部有许多大型度假村和酒店，提供大量儿童活动
content.en_text: The south of the island has many large resorts and hotels with plenty of children's activities

content.cn_text: 和俱乐部。
content.en_text: and clubs.

content.cn_text: 岛上这一部分主要面向寻求豪华到中档住宿的人，
content.en_text: This part of the island caters mainly for those seeking luxury to medium-class accommodation,

content.cn_text: 但东海岸有基础公寓楼，配备设施齐全的厨房，所以至少
content.en_text: but the east coast has basic apartment complexes with fully equipped kitchens so that at least

content.cn_text: 你可以自己做饭。
content.en_text: you can cook for yourself.

content.cn_text: 对于喜欢亲近自然的人来说，你可能会觉得南海岸
content.en_text: For those who like to get back to nature, you'll probably find the south coast rather

content.cn_text: 开发过度。
content.en_text: overdeveloped.

content.cn_text: 西海岸的雨林地区由于周围山脉阻隔，基本难以到达，
content.en_text: The rainforest areas on the west coast are largely inaccessible because of the surrounding mountains,

content.cn_text: 但北海岸的雨林很容易到达，而且当地机构会组织有导游带领的
content.en_text: but those on the north coast are within easy reach and a local agency runs guided

content.cn_text: 丛林徒步。
content.en_text: treks through the jungle.

content.cn_text: 如果你喜欢水上运动，所有这些地区都有一些项目可供选择。
content.en_text: If you're into water sports, all of the areas have something to offer.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余节目之前，你有一些时间查看第16至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the program, you have some time to look at questions 16-20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第16至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 16-20.

content.cn_text: 现在，这里有几条给首次到访该岛游客的建议。
content.en_text: Now here are a few bits of advice for those visiting the island for the first time.

content.cn_text: 这些建议会让你的停留更安全、更愉快。
content.en_text: To make your stay safer and more enjoyable.

content.cn_text: 该岛总体上很安全，但最好还是采取一些预防措施。
content.en_text: The island is generally safe, but it's as well to take a few precautions.

content.cn_text: 如果你正在服用任何药物，请随身带上。
content.en_text: If you're on any medication, bring this with you.

content.cn_text: 岛上可能买不到。
content.en_text: It may not be available on the island.

content.cn_text: 每个人在行李里带一些驱虫喷雾也是个好主意。
content.en_text: And it's also a good idea for everyone to pack some insect spray in their luggage.

content.cn_text: 如果你打算前往岛西部更多山地的区域，
content.en_text: If you're thinking of going into the more mountainous region in the west of the island,

content.cn_text: 要让别人知道你要去哪里。
content.en_text: let someone know where you're going.

content.cn_text: 并且记住，你的手机信号可能不可靠，所以不要依赖
content.en_text: And remember, the reception for your mobile phone may be unreliable, so don't depend on

content.cn_text: 它。
content.en_text: that.

content.cn_text: 带上自己的水，不要喝河流里的水。
content.en_text: Take your own water, don't drink out of rivers.

content.cn_text: 你很可能会遇到很多猴子，它们很可爱，但要小心，因为它们会咬人。
content.en_text: You're likely to come across lots of monkeys, they're cute, but watch out as they can bite.

content.cn_text: 最后，当你回到人口较多的地区时，暂时别吃牛排了，一定要尝尝
content.en_text: Finally, when you're back in the more inhabited areas, take a break from steak and do try the

content.cn_text: 当地的海鲜。
content.en_text: local seafood.

content.cn_text: 它很新鲜，而且很划算。
content.en_text: It's fresh and very good value.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of part 2.

content.cn_text: 现在你有45秒时间检查第二部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have 45 seconds to check your answers to part 2.

items.title: At the present time, Stanley Island can be reached by
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问目前 Stanley Island 可通过什么到达，原文说 sole link is provided by the old ferry service，因此答案是 C。

items.title: golf courses

items.title: self-catering flats
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问 self-catering flats 在哪里，原文说 east coast has apartment complexes with fully equipped kitchens，因此答案是 C。

items.title: nature walks
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问 nature walks 在哪里，原文说 north coast... guided treks through the jungle，因此答案是 A。

items.title: Bring your own 16. _____ and insect spray
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问需要自带什么和 insect spray，原文说 If you’re on any medication, bring this with you，因此答案是 medication。

items.title: It may not be possible to use your 17. _____ in the western area
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问在西部地区可能无法使用什么，原文说 mobile phone reception may be unreliable，因此答案是 mobile phone。

items.title: Don't drink water from 18. _____
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问不要喝哪里的水，原文说 don’t drink out of rivers，因此答案是 rivers。

items.title: Be careful of the 19. _____ as they bite
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问要小心什么，因为它们会咬人，原文说 monkeys... can bite，因此答案是 monkeys。

items.title: Try the local 20. _____
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问建议尝试当地什么，原文说 try the local seafood，因此答案是 seafood。
